pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo may fail to instrument or analyze bytecode generated by Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Checkstyle Maven plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Checkstyle may not support parsing or checking Java 21 syntax features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Compiler Plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may not fully support Java 21 language features or toolchains.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven WAR Plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions may have issues with newer JDK class file formats or module structures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set scope to provided for jakarta.annotation-api to avoid conflicts with container-provided APIs.
pom.xml.why_exists: Including this dependency with compile scope can lead to runtime conflicts if the application server provides its own version, which is common in Jakarta EE environments.

src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused static import of java.lang.String.format as it is no longer used in the file.
Replace String.format call with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
